'''Velus''' was the only [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Velus system]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by five [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]].<ref name="CATCW" />

{{Star-stub}}
